with:
  if p == "nationality":
              # Provide a more explicit statement of nationality
              low_obj = obj.lower()
              if low_obj in ("united states", "usa", "united states of america"):
                  return "is an American"
              # Use \"has nationality\" phrasing for other countries
              return f"has nationality {obj}"

  # First, aggregate mission‑crew relationships to produce combined sentences
      from collections import defaultdict
      mission_astronauts = defaultdict(list)

              # subject is astronaut, object is mission
              mission_astronauts[t.object.strip().strip('"')].append(t.subject)
          elif pred == "crewmembers":
              # subject is mission, object is astronaut
              mission_astronauts[t.subject].append(t.object.strip().strip('"'))
          else:
              remaining_triples.append(t)
  
      # Build sentences for aggregated mission crew information

              agg = f"{uniq[0]} was a crew member of {mission}."

              agg = f"{', '.join(uniq[:-1])} and {uniq[-1]} were crew members of {mission}."
